name: force-graph
title: Force Graph
author: Parable
description: A canvas force-directed graph with a seeded deterministic layout: nodes repel, links act as springs, and the simulation cools until it settles and stops ticking entirely. Hover or keyboard-focus highlights a node's neighbourhood with per-group theme-aware colours and pulse rings on emphasis nodes. Pre-settles synchronously to a static frame under prefers-reduced-motion.
